completed_tasks.progress: Chart form rebuild complete on feature branch (21 commits, 41 tests passing, build green). Ready to merge and test.

remaining_tasks.name: Test full chart lifecycle in browser (create, view, edit, status, delete)

decisions.decision: Ground-up chart form rebuild (not incremental patch)
decisions.rationale: ~15 DesignOS divergences; no users/data so clean slate is better

decisions.decision: DialogTrigger uses render prop (base-ui) not asChild (Radix)
StartPreferenceFields derives from props (no internal state)
decisions.rationale: ESLint rule blocked setState in useEffect; derived state is cleaner

decisions.decision: Native checkbox with accent-primary instead of shadcn Checkbox
decisions.rationale: No shadcn Checkbox installed; native + accent-primary is KISS for 2 options
Was missing from devDependencies; needed for form interaction tests

next_action: 1) Merge feature/chart-form-rebuild to main (or create PR). 2) Run dev server, test full chart lifecycle. 3) Complete 02-05 checkpoint.
context_notes: Currently on branch feature/chart-form-rebuild (21 commits ahead of main). All code builds and tests pass. The rebuild replaced the 651-line monolithic chart-form.tsx with composable architecture: useChartForm hook + 10 form primitives + 8 sections + 2 surfaces (ChartAddForm full-page, ChartEditModal tabbed dialog). Design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-28-chart-form-rebuild-design.md, implementation plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-28-chart-form-rebuild.md. R2 still not configured — uploads will show graceful error.
